sources.label: Linear UI redesign hierarchy study
borrowed: Quiet chrome with alignment doing most of the structural work
Compressed but readable secondary metadata instead of dashboard filler
rejected: Issue-tracker side-panel complexity in the booking shell

sources.label: Linear design refresh essay
borrowed: Prune visible actions until one dominant next step remains
Use calmer header bars to reduce interface crowding
rejected: Multi-product header splitting that would over-complicate a patient flow

sources.label: Vercel nested layouts guidance
borrowed: Persistent section chrome around changing child content
Child slotting instead of rebuilding the whole page family on every route
rejected: Framework-specific implementation details that are not relevant to this Vite app

sources.label: NHS action link guidance
borrowed: Verb-first action labels
Short signposting copy for the support path
rejected: Using action-link styling as a substitute for the shell's primary button

sources.label: NHS summary list guidance
borrowed: Definition-list style summaries for compact preference and continuity facts
Small explicit labels instead of paragraph-heavy recaps
rejected: Long check-answers treatment that would make the shell feel like a form review page

sources.label: NHS start-page guidance
borrowed: Immediate orientation about what the service is for
Expectation-setting before the next action is taken
rejected: A detached start page outside the signed-in shell

sources.label: NHS interruption-page guidance
borrowed: Use high-emphasis interruption styling sparingly for blocked or recovery states
rejected: Full interruption-page takeovers for ordinary degraded booking posture

sources.label: NHS content guide
borrowed: Plain-spoken transactional language
Avoiding vague reassurance when truth is still pending
rejected: Long explanatory paragraphs where a short operational sentence is enough

sources.label: WAI landmark-region guidance
borrowed: One clear main landmark
Complementary rails with explicit structural roles
rejected: Excess nested named regions that would add noise

sources.label: WCAG 2.2 focus order
borrowed: DOM order that preserves meaning even when the visual layout uses multiple rails
rejected: Keyboard order that follows visual rails but delays the dominant action

sources.label: WCAG 2.2 animation from interactions
borrowed: Reduced-motion parity for shell transitions and sticky action trays
rejected: Large motion-heavy panel shifts during recovery swaps

sources.label: Playwright aria snapshots
borrowed: Scoped accessibility tree snapshots for normal and degraded shell states
rejected: Relying only on visual screenshots for shell verification

sources.label: Playwright accessibility testing
borrowed: Accessibility checks as one layer alongside manual semantic assertions
rejected: Treating automated checks as complete accessibility proof

sources.label: Playwright trace viewer
borrowed: Trace capture in the route-family proof harness
rejected: Debugging failed navigation only from console output

sources.label: Playwright page.goBack history guidance
borrowed: Explicit browser-history verification for same-shell child routes
rejected: Testing route restoration only through programmatic re-entry
